title: linaria supina subsp. maritima
intro: Linaria supina subsp. maritima, also known as sea toadflax, is a perennial plant that belongs to the figwort family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Linaria supina subsp. maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory problems, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its uses and preparations may require further research and validation.
